title: LinkedIn Company Scraper
description: Scrape public LinkedIn company pages to extract comprehensive company information, employees, posts, funding, locations, and specialties.

url.title: LinkedIn Company URL
url.description: Single LinkedIn company page URL. For lower Apify costs, prefer the URLs field when scraping multiple companies.

urls.title: LinkedIn Company URLs
urls.description: Multiple LinkedIn company page URLs to process in one Apify run. This is the recommended option for batches because it avoids one Apify run per result.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: Whether to use cached results if available

maximum_cache_age.title: Maximum Cache Age
maximum_cache_age.description: Maximum age of cached results in seconds. Only used when 'Use Cache' is enabled.
